item.name: Wind-up Nidhogg
item.description:
Now with more eyes.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Nidhogg minion.
item.tooltip:
Eternal is a dragon's rage,
Dread Nidhogg's wrath did
span an age.
   - The Wandering Minstrel
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 110 to all enemies within range.
